title: Technology Basics
description: Question batch for the Artificial Intelligence Basics domain.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Artificial intelligence?
answers: Technology that performs tasks usually linked to human-like intelligence.
Examples used to help a model learn during development.
The stage where a trained model produces an output or prediction.
The learned system that turns inputs into predictions or responses.
questions.explanation: Artificial intelligence is technology that performs tasks usually linked to human-like intelligence.

questions.question: What does Machine learning refer to?
answers: An AI approach where systems learn patterns from data.
The stage where a trained model produces an output or prediction.
The learned system that turns inputs into predictions or responses.
The input text or instruction given to a generative AI system.
questions.explanation: Machine learning is an AI approach where systems learn patterns from data.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Training data?
answers: Examples used to help a model learn during development.
The learned system that turns inputs into predictions or responses.
The input text or instruction given to a generative AI system.
An organized collection of data used for training or evaluation.
questions.explanation: Training data is examples used to help a model learn during development.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Inference?
answers: The stage where a trained model produces an output or prediction.
The input text or instruction given to a generative AI system.
An organized collection of data used for training or evaluation.
The known answer or category attached to training data.
questions.explanation: Inference is the stage where a trained model produces an output or prediction.

questions.question: What does Model refer to?
answers: The learned system that turns inputs into predictions or responses.
An organized collection of data used for training or evaluation.
The known answer or category attached to training data.
Learning from examples that already include the correct answer.
questions.explanation: Model is the learned system that turns inputs into predictions or responses.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Prompt?
answers: The input text or instruction given to a generative AI system.
The known answer or category attached to training data.
Learning from examples that already include the correct answer.
Learning patterns from data without labeled answers.
questions.explanation: Prompt is the input text or instruction given to a generative AI system.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Dataset?
answers: An organized collection of data used for training or evaluation.
Learning from examples that already include the correct answer.
Learning patterns from data without labeled answers.
Learning by trial, feedback, and rewards for actions.
questions.explanation: Dataset is an organized collection of data used for training or evaluation.

questions.question: What does Label refer to?
answers: The known answer or category attached to training data.
Learning patterns from data without labeled answers.
Learning by trial, feedback, and rewards for actions.
A model architecture inspired by connected layers of simple processing units.
questions.explanation: Label is the known answer or category attached to training data.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Supervised learning?
answers: Learning from examples that already include the correct answer.
Learning by trial, feedback, and rewards for actions.
A model architecture inspired by connected layers of simple processing units.
Machine learning that uses many layers in a neural network.
questions.explanation: Supervised learning is learning from examples that already include the correct answer.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Unsupervised learning?
answers: Learning patterns from data without labeled answers.
A model architecture inspired by connected layers of simple processing units.
Machine learning that uses many layers in a neural network.
AI focused on understanding and generating human language.
questions.explanation: Unsupervised learning is learning patterns from data without labeled answers.

questions.question: What does Reinforcement learning refer to?
answers: Learning by trial, feedback, and rewards for actions.
Machine learning that uses many layers in a neural network.
AI focused on understanding and generating human language.
AI focused on interpreting images and video.
questions.explanation: Reinforcement learning is learning by trial, feedback, and rewards for actions.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Neural network?
answers: A model architecture inspired by connected layers of simple processing units.
AI focused on understanding and generating human language.
AI focused on interpreting images and video.
A model that assigns inputs to categories.
questions.explanation: Neural network is a model architecture inspired by connected layers of simple processing units.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Deep learning?
answers: Machine learning that uses many layers in a neural network.
AI focused on interpreting images and video.
A model that assigns inputs to categories.
A model that predicts a numeric value instead of a category.
questions.explanation: Deep learning is machine learning that uses many layers in a neural network.

questions.question: What does Natural language processing refer to?
answers: AI focused on understanding and generating human language.
A model that assigns inputs to categories.
A model that predicts a numeric value instead of a category.
A measurable input value used by a model.
questions.explanation: Natural language processing is aI focused on understanding and generating human language.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Computer vision?
answers: AI focused on interpreting images and video.
A model that predicts a numeric value instead of a category.
A measurable input value used by a model.
When a model learns training details too closely and performs poorly on new data.
questions.explanation: Computer vision is aI focused on interpreting images and video.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Classifier?
answers: A model that assigns inputs to categories.
A measurable input value used by a model.
When a model learns training details too closely and performs poorly on new data.
A systematic skew in data or model behavior that can lead to unfair outputs.
questions.explanation: Classifier is a model that assigns inputs to categories.

questions.question: What does Regression model refer to?
answers: A model that predicts a numeric value instead of a category.
When a model learns training details too closely and performs poorly on new data.
A systematic skew in data or model behavior that can lead to unfair outputs.
When a generative model produces false or made-up information.
questions.explanation: Regression model is a model that predicts a numeric value instead of a category.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Feature?
answers: A measurable input value used by a model.
A systematic skew in data or model behavior that can lead to unfair outputs.
When a generative model produces false or made-up information.
Additional training that adapts a model to a narrower task or style.
questions.explanation: Feature is a measurable input value used by a model.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Overfitting?
answers: When a model learns training details too closely and performs poorly on new data.
When a generative model produces false or made-up information.
Additional training that adapts a model to a narrower task or style.
A neural architecture widely used in modern language models.
questions.explanation: Overfitting is when a model learns training details too closely and performs poorly on new data.

questions.question: What does Bias refer to?
answers: A systematic skew in data or model behavior that can lead to unfair outputs.
Additional training that adapts a model to a narrower task or style.
A neural architecture widely used in modern language models.
A small unit of text processed by a language model.
questions.explanation: Bias is a systematic skew in data or model behavior that can lead to unfair outputs.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Hallucination?
answers: When a generative model produces false or made-up information.
A neural architecture widely used in modern language models.
A small unit of text processed by a language model.
The amount of input and recent text a model can consider at once.
questions.explanation: Hallucination is when a generative model produces false or made-up information.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Fine-tuning?
answers: Additional training that adapts a model to a narrower task or style.
A small unit of text processed by a language model.
The amount of input and recent text a model can consider at once.
A numeric representation that captures relationships between pieces of data.
questions.explanation: Fine-tuning is additional training that adapts a model to a narrower task or style.

questions.question: What does Transformer refer to?
answers: A neural architecture widely used in modern language models.
The amount of input and recent text a model can consider at once.
A numeric representation that captures relationships between pieces of data.
AI that suggests items based on patterns in user behavior or content.
questions.explanation: Transformer is a neural architecture widely used in modern language models.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Token?
answers: A small unit of text processed by a language model.
A numeric representation that captures relationships between pieces of data.
AI that suggests items based on patterns in user behavior or content.
Software that simulates a conversation with a user.
questions.explanation: Token is a small unit of text processed by a language model.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Context window?
answers: The amount of input and recent text a model can consider at once.
AI that suggests items based on patterns in user behavior or content.
Software that simulates a conversation with a user.
Data used to check model performance during development.
questions.explanation: Context window is the amount of input and recent text a model can consider at once.

questions.question: What does Embedding refer to?
answers: A numeric representation that captures relationships between pieces of data.
Software that simulates a conversation with a user.
Data used to check model performance during development.
One complete pass through training data during model training.
questions.explanation: Embedding is a numeric representation that captures relationships between pieces of data.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Recommendation system?
answers: AI that suggests items based on patterns in user behavior or content.
Data used to check model performance during development.
One complete pass through training data during model training.
Technology that performs tasks usually linked to human-like intelligence.
questions.explanation: Recommendation system is aI that suggests items based on patterns in user behavior or content.

questions.question: Which statement best describes Chatbot?
answers: Software that simulates a conversation with a user.
One complete pass through training data during model training.
Technology that performs tasks usually linked to human-like intelligence.
An AI approach where systems learn patterns from data.
questions.explanation: Chatbot is software that simulates a conversation with a user.

questions.question: What does Validation set refer to?
answers: Data used to check model performance during development.
Technology that performs tasks usually linked to human-like intelligence.
An AI approach where systems learn patterns from data.
Examples used to help a model learn during development.
questions.explanation: Validation set is data used to check model performance during development.

questions.question: In basic technology, what is Epoch?
answers: One complete pass through training data during model training.
An AI approach where systems learn patterns from data.
Examples used to help a model learn during development.
The stage where a trained model produces an output or prediction.
questions.explanation: Epoch is one complete pass through training data during model training.
